title: lycium carolinianum var. sandwicense
intro: Lycium carolinianum var. sandwicense, also known as the Hawaiian wolfberry, is a variety of the Lycium carolinianum plant, a type of shrub native to Hawaii and the Pacific Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lycium carolinianum var. sandwicense include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is valued for its potential to promote overall well-being and longevity.
